meta.ministry: Ministry of Personnel, Public Grievances and Pensions, Department of Administrative Reforms and Public Grievances
meta.project_subject: Setting up of PMU for CPGRAMS with 3 resource persons for a period w.e.f. 18th Jan.2024 to 31st March,2024-extending of project-reg.
meta.deliverables: Quality analysis of Grievances on monthly basis, preparation of monthly reports, data analysis, and any other work assigned from time to time. Payment milestones include 25% upon award and commencement, 25% upon finalization of January 2024 monthly report, 25% upon submission of February 2024 monthly report, and 25% upon submission of March 2024 monthly report.

content.full_text: The Department of Administrative Reforms and Public Grievances under the Ministry of Personnel, Public Grievances and Pensions extends the work order to Quality Council of India for setting up a Project Management Unit (PMU) for CPGRAMS. The project involves 3 resource persons and runs from 18 January 2024 to 31 March 2024 at a cost of Rs.13,10,400/- (excluding taxes). This extension follows previous letters dated 14 July 2023 and 4 December 2023. Key deliverables include monthly quality analysis of grievances, preparation of monthly reports, data analysis, and other assigned tasks. Payment is structured in four 25% milestones tied to work commencement and monthly report submissions for January, February, and March 2024.
